name: refund request with order id and email
input: Hi, my email is ada@example.com. My order ID is ORD-123. This is urgent because I want a refund.

name: normal support request without refund
input: Hello, you can reach me at grace@example.com. My order ID is ORD-456. I just want to know when it will arrive.

name: urgent issue without refund
input: Please help urgently. Contact me at alan@example.com. My order ID is ORD-789. The package arrived damaged.
